series_metadata.series_title: Private Investigator Security Guard Registrant Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains original and renewal registrant applications and any supporting documents such as: correspondence, change of address, refunds, invoices, etc. May also contain firearm-bearer (FAB) application and annual requalification applications.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: current, four years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of registration. ; Electronic: current, four years following date of lapse, expiration, or termination of registration
